text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our intense summer camp experience has come to
an end...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This reluctance to leave is a feeling I doubt I'll
ever get used to. I experienced it last year as well.
choice_data_list: That shows you had a great time.
That shows you had a great time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: If possible, I'd like to return here someday...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ah, it appears the bus has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Shall we head back to the academy, then,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that summer camp's over, the Mainichi Okan
is fast approaching.
